reset.title: Reset Password
reset.emailPlaceholder: Enter the email that received the reset link
reset.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from the email
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
reset.weakComplexity: Password must include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, digit, symbol.
reset.error: Unable to reset password. The link may have expired.
reset.success: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with the new password.
reset.requestIntro: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
reset.requestSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
reset.requestError: Unable to request a reset right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
reset.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait an hour before trying again.
reset.haveTokenLink: I already have a reset token
reset.confirmIntro: Paste the token from your email and set a new password.
reset.sameBrowserRequired: For your security, open this link in the same browser where you requested the reset. If you clicked the link from a different device or in private/incognito mode, request a new reset from the device you'll use.
